name: Brandied Cheddar Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the cheese through a meat grinder, food processor, and etc. using the finest blade.
2. Combine the cheese in a mixing bowl with all other ingredients.
3. Mix well.
4. Chill in the refrigerator.
5. Remove from the refrigerator about a half-hour before serving so the cheese may be spread easily.
6. A good bourbon may be substituted for brandy with excellent results.
7. Makes about two cups.
